lines.target: Hello. Who is this? Oh, good morning sir.
lines.base: ¡Diga! ¿ Quién es (éste) ? Ah, buenos dias (buena mañana) señor,
lines.pronunciation: .. huis dziz? — 2 ... his ofis nomber ? — 3 ... for-tu-siks-eit. — 4 ... ekstenshén zérti faiv. itsá pleshor...

lines.target: No, he's not here. Have you got his office number?
lines.base: No, (él) no está aquí. ¿ Tiene usted el número de su oficina ?

lines.target: Wait a minute. Ah, it's four-two-six-eight.
Ask for extension thirty-five. It's a pleasure. Good-bye.
lines.base: Pida (por) la extensión 35. (Ello) es un placer. Adiós.

lines.target: You've got the wrong number. That's alright. Good-bye.
lines.base: Se ha equivocado usted de número (tiene usted el número equivocado). De nada. Adiós.
lines.pronunciation: .. ong nambér. dzats olrait... — 7 ... minit... senté i

lines.target: Have you got a minute? This sentence is very strange:
lines.base: ¿Tiene (usted) un minuto? Esta frase es muy extraña:

lines.pronunciation: aim fedáp. — 9 án idiom... miins aj am bora. ter or end ov iu. — 11 ... menshén...

lines.target: It's an idiom, it means “ I am bored ” .
lines.base: (Esto) es una frase hecha (ella) significa: «(yo estoy harto » (estoy aburrido, estoy « hasta la coronilla »).

lines.target: Thank you, that's very kind of you.
lines.base: Gracias, es muy amable (de su parte).

gap_candidates.target: No, he's not here. Have you got his office number?
Wait a minute. Ah, it's four-two-six-eight. (1)
Ask for extension thirty-five. It's a pleasure. Good-bye. (2)
You've got the wrong number. That's alright. Good-bye. (3)
It's an idiom, it means “ I am bored ” . (5)
Thank you, that's very kind of you.
